{{Quote|Hey, Emee. Next time that crook Gizmel darkens my doorstep, lock him in the chiller. His tab is longer than a Wookiee's leg, and it's time to pay up.|Nak, to [[ME-3P]] about [[Gizmel Gam]]|<ref name="TOR:AFoT"/>}}
'''Nak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] bartender and owner of the [[Ardak Point cantina]] in [[Kessan's Landing]], on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], during the [[Third Galactic War]].<ref name="TOR:AFoT"/>
{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Legacy of the Sith]]'' {{1st}}
